extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won from a select group after BORA's ferocious opening climb pace shattered the sprinters, gaining SAGAN the green jersey by forcing pure speed rivals off contention.
tactical_patterns: BORA put SAGAN fifth wheel on opening Cat 3 climb specifically to crack pure sprinters, sacrificing breakaway points for green jersey attrition.
INEOS moved to front before Pyrenees rest day on sprinter stage, signaling willingness to stress GC rivals preemptively when unexpected.
POGAČAR, LANDA, PORTE lost 1:21-2:53 in final 40km on supposed sprint stage, revealing positioning complacency before mountain stages.
Teams of dropped sprinters regrouped mid-stage creating secondary peloton, but tactical damage already done as SAGAN gained green without contesting finish.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: Won after aggressive early pace setting, demonstrating ability to both torture field and finish after hard stages.
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: positive: Orchestrated opening climb pace sitting fifth wheel to eliminate pure sprinters, retook green jersey without needing sprint finish.
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: Lost 1:21 in final 40km on transition stage day before Pyrenees, showing poor positioning awareness or team support gaps.
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: Dropped 2:53 from 13 seconds off yellow on flat stage, catastrophic loss before mountains despite being GC-positioned.
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Lost 1:21 same as Pogačar despite climbing pedigree, suggesting positioning discipline issues on controlled stages.
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Lost green jersey after being dropped on opening Cat 3, lacks SAGAN's resilience on undulating sprint stages.
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: Dropped early on brutal opening climb despite predicting difficulty, confirmed weakness on power-heavy sprint days.
rider_signals.COSNEFROY Benoît: neutral: KOM leader attempted solo opening climb attack but caught, showing jersey defense mentality but insufficient strength.
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: Involved in sprint positioning protest and relegated to 12th, wasted energy contesting non-GC stage.
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: Finished fourth from select group after hard opening, shows COFIDIS has second-tier finisher when sprinters eliminated.
